hero.title:
Tradition Portal &
Cultural Calendar
hero.description: Discover the beauty and richness of the Archipelago's culture. Explore ceremonies, history, and important spiritual activity schedules such as Wuku and Sasih, connecting with our dimension of belief.

features.title: Platform Features
features.description: Explore insights and traditions with interactive tools to support a better understanding of the spirituality and culture of the Archipelago.

items.title: History Education
items.description: Interactive learning modules discussing the history, philosophy, and essential elements of various traditions and ceremonies.

items.title: Global Event Calendar
items.description: A complete schedule of ceremonies, temple festivals (odalan), and important celebrations organized according to the traditional calendar system.

items.title: Tourist Guide
items.description: Information on visiting etiquette, ceremony locations, dress codes, and dos/don'ts for the general public.

calendar.title: Interactive Cultural Calendar
calendar.description: Don't miss out on important activities this month. Find detailed event schedules and plan your spiritual participation.

highlight.subtitle: HISTORICAL VALUE
highlight.title: Bridging Cultures
highlight.text1: The Kecak dance is not just a dance, but a representation of the rhythm of life and togetherness of the Balinese people. The overlapping 'cak' sounds create a magical harmony that moves the soul.
highlight.text2: Through performing arts like Kecak, we invite you to enter the epic story of Ramayana, feel the power of prayer, and appreciate the value of goodness that transcends time.

newsletter.title: Don't Miss an Event
newsletter.description: Register your email to receive ceremony schedule notifications and the latest cultural information from us.
